name: Cookies Your Way
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill
Preparation Time: 0:30
Use a versatile cake mix that allows you to add ingredients of your choice to create a unique cake. Do not use a cake mix with pudding in it. Use one or more of the ingredients listed.
Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Combine the cake mix, eggs, and oil. Mix well, then add the optional ingredients and blend in. Drop by rounded teaspoons onto an ungreased cookie sheet. Bake for 9-12 minutes.
